mission.title: openeverest: Uninstallation stuck with ImagePullBackOff for the bitnami/kubectl image
mission.description: Uninstallation is stuck in the 'Deleting database namespace' step because the everest-helm-pre-delete-hook job cannot pull the bitnami/kubectl image.

steps.title: Identify the stuck uninstallation
steps.description:
Check for stuck pre-delete hook pods:
```bash
kubectl get pods -l job-name -n everest-system | grep pre-delete
kubectl get jobs -n everest-system | grep pre-delete
```
Look for pods in ImagePullBackOff state.

steps.title: Diagnose the image pull failure
steps.description:
Describe the stuck pod:
```bash
kubectl describe pod -l job-name=everest-helm-pre-delete-hook -n everest-system
```
Check events for Docker Hub rate limiting or network issues with the bitnami/kubectl image.

steps.title: Apply the fix
steps.description:
Delete the stuck pre-delete hook job to allow uninstallation to proceed:
```bash
kubectl delete job -l app.kubernetes.io/component=pre-delete-hook -n everest-system
```

If the Helm uninstall is still stuck, force it:
```bash
helm uninstall everest-core --namespace everest-system --no-hooks
```

Then manually clean up remaining resources:
```bash
kubectl delete namespace everest-system
```

steps.title: Confirm the uninstallation completed
steps.description:
Verify that all OpenEverest resources have been removed:
```bash
kubectl get all -n everest-system
kubectl get namespace everest-system
helm list -n everest-system
```
All commands should return empty or 'not found'.

resolution.summary: The uninstallation hangs because the Helm pre-delete hook job fails to pull the bitnami/kubectl image. Delete the stuck job or use helm uninstall with --no-hooks to bypass the hook, then manually clean up the namespace.

prerequisites.description: A Kubernetes cluster where OpenEverest uninstallation is stuck.
